TextView.android:text:
Meditation Routine

1. Morning Mindfulness
Spend 5-10 minutes focusing on your breath to start the day calmly.

2. Body Scan
Lie down and mentally scan your body from head to toe to release tension.

3. Guided Meditation
Use apps or audio for 10-15 minutes to meditate with guidance.

4. Gratitude Practice
Spend 2-3 minutes thinking of things you are grateful for.

5. Deep Breathing
Take 5 slow, deep breaths to reduce stress.

6. Walking Meditation
Walk slowly and focus on each step for 5-10 minutes.

7. Visualization
Visualize a peaceful scene or a goal to promote relaxation.

8. Mindful Eating
Take one meal or snack mindfully, paying attention to taste and texture.

9. Evening Reflection
Spend 5 minutes reflecting on your day before bed.

10. Sleep Preparation
Do gentle stretches and deep breathing to prepare for restful sleep.
